arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE EMIRATES STADIUM: The player was substituted off in the second half in a major concern ahead of Wednesday's showdown.

arts.ttl: Arteta fears 'significant' injury as Arsenal sweat over double blow
arts.sum: The midfielder was unable to continue soon after opening the scoring

arts.ttl: Familiar issues on show as Arsenal risk losing momentum ahead of Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: The Gunners played out a drab draw with Brentford with much of the focus elsewhere

arts.ttl: Arsenal 1-1 Brentford: Gunners toil to derby draw ahead of Real Madrid decider
arts.sum: Arsenal again dropped points in the Premier League title race as Brentford came from behind to earn a point.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 1-1 Brentford: Player Ratings as Gunners Prepare for Santiago Bernabeu Trip
arts.sum: Arsenal drew with Brentford ahead of their return leg with Real Madrid, their 12th draw in the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Man United eye-up Ajax wonderkid dubbed 'the next Jude Bellingham' - as Red Devils get set to target young stars with high potential this summer
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Manchester United are limited budget wise to what they can do at first team level this summer with a lot depending on who they can sell.
